_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Markdown viewer for subdirectory docs, sharper per-page help-doc mappings, and favicon route

steps.description: app.py /favicon.ico route; system.py /docs/{doc_path:path} with recursive docs/**/*.md + curated CLAUDE.md allow-list, 4-part traversal guard, H1-derived title; help.py _SLUG_TO_DOC retargeting (code -> RAG CLAUDE.md; item_detail/research/search -> Dashboard_Design; projects unchanged); dashboard/CLAUDE.md note
Per-agent review of S01: path traversal on the :path converter, allow-list correctness, FileResponse safety, anchor validity, no scope creep

Extend tests/dashboard/test_system_docs_route.py (subdir 200, RAG CLAUDE.md 200, flat-form regression, traversal/rejection 404 x5, H1 title); add tests/dashboard/test_favicon.py; update tests/dashboard/test_help_router.py mapping asserts
Per-agent review of S03: traversal negative tests present, help-mapping asserts precise (no false-positive on /system/docs/orch/rag/CLAUDE.md), favicon + H1-title tests, test isolation
Cross-agent global review: AC1-AC6 trace, traversal security re-trace, anchor verification, no scope creep, full test suite
QV: Browser verification — favicon no console error; code help popover opens RAG doc; item_detail/research/search links -> Dashboard_Design; subdir doc renders + traversal rejected; no regressions
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
